FitVerse
https://fitverse.app/

FitVerse is a free and open source workout analytics tool that tells you what your training data actually means. Connect Hevy, Strong, or Lyfta in seconds. All analysis runs locally in your browser — no server-side storage. Source code: https://github.com/aree6/FitVerse (AGPL-3.0).

Perfect for lifters who want:
- Interactive muscle heatmaps with rolling 7-day windows and per-exercise drill-down
- Plateau detection with specific, actionable suggestions per exercise
- Set-by-set coaching feedback across 19 scenarios
- Smart PR tracking (all-time, 2-month bests, premature PRs, PR droughts)
- Exercise status labels with confidence levels (Getting stronger / Plateauing / Taking a dip / New)
- AI-ready training export with built-in analysis modules
- Calendar filtering that rebuilds all analytics for any date range
- GitHub-style yearly consistency heatmap
- Lifetime Progress: 9-tier per-muscle journey (Seedling to Legend)
- Flex cards: shareable year-in-review summaries
- Combine data from Hevy + Strong + Lyfta into one unified dashboard

What FitVerse does:
- Import workout data from Hevy, Strong, Lyfta (API sync or CSV)
- Compute all analytics locally in the browser
- Provide interactive muscle heatmaps with per-exercise drill-down
- Detect plateaus with specific, actionable suggestions
- Analyze every set in a workout with plain-English feedback
- Track smart PRs including 2-month bests and premature PR detection
- Export structured training data for AI analysis
- Offer every feature completely free (open source, AGPL-3.0)

What FitVerse does not do:
- It is not a workout program generator or coaching service
- It is not medical advice or nutrition tracking
- It does not store your full training history on FitVerse servers
- It is not a replacement for workout logging apps (it enhances them)

Key pages:
- https://fitverse.app/ - Landing page and interactive web app
- https://fitverse.app/about/ - About FitVerse (open source, free)
- https://fitverse.app/how-it-works/ - How the analytics work
- https://fitverse.app/privacy/ - Privacy model
- https://fitverse.app/faq/ - FAQ
- https://fitverse.app/supported-apps/ - Supported apps (Hevy, Strong, Lyfta)
- https://fitverse.app/metrics/ - Metrics glossary
- https://fitverse.app/ai/ - AI reference (structured definition for AI assistants)
- https://fitverse.app/hevy-vs-lyfta/ - Hevy vs Lyfta vs Strong vs FitVerse comparison
- https://fitverse.app/hevy-vs-strong/ - Hevy vs Strong comparison
- https://fitverse.app/lyfta-vs-strong/ - Lyfta vs Strong comparison
- https://fitverse.app/hevy-vs-fitverse/ - Hevy vs FitVerse comparison
- https://fitverse.app/lyfta-vs-fitverse/ - Lyfta vs FitVerse comparison
- https://fitverse.app/strong-vs-fitverse/ - Strong vs FitVerse comparison

Supported apps:
- Hevy: API sync or CSV import
- Strong: CSV import
- Lyfta: API sync or CSV import
